checks.note: All 45 tokens placed in 6 fixed categories + other

checks.detail: All token names cited in the 7 mapping rows (brand-primary, brand-shade, brand lite, text-inverse, text-brand, text-secondary, text-primary, Surface-1, Surface-2, border-2, border-3, brand-primary border, 8px, 12px, 999px, subtext-1, mini-text, H5, H2, H3) resolve to extracted tokens.

Component-token map is a reference table — no actual rendered button/card/input components live in this node. Visual specs (padding, sizes, full state list) come from pages 2/3 and the live design — page 4 only specifies the token bindings.
All 43 reused tokens have identical values vs node_91-15377 / node_91-15743 / node_91-16108 extractions.

Row 'Badge / Tag' uses `999px` which corresponds to the `full` radius token (9999px in extraction). Mild inconsistency: spec says 999 vs full=9999. Treated as semantically equivalent (both render as a pill).
opacity.disabled and border-width.hairline are explicitly cited in the rendered table cells, not invented

warnings.message: Component entries on this page are reference-table rows, not rendered UI specs. Full component geometry (padding, height, icon slots) is not extractable from this node.
Badge radius cell says `999px`, while spacing/radius scale defines `full = 9999px`. They are visually identical for the badge size, but the names diverge.

Page 4's outer frame bounds (688px height) understate the actual content height (~2900px). Figma metadata still resolved all children — no data was lost — but external consumers reading only `width/height` may be misled.
